sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75041" key="o)rqri/dios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρθρ-ίδιος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ρῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὄρθριος,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.2</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.
